title: Volumetric Weight Calculator
description: Industrial-grade volumetric weight calculation tool compliant with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards. Calculates dimensional weight, actual weight, chargeable weight, and provides cost optimization insights.

inputs.label: Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Physical length of the package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical length of the package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

inputs.label: Width (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Physical width of the package in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical width of the package in centimeters.

inputs.label: Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Physical height of the package in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical height of the package in centimeters.

inputs.label: Actual Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Gross weight of the package including packaging. Per ISO 80000-4:2006.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross weight of the package including packaging. Per ISO 80000-4:2006.

inputs.label: Carrier DIM Factor
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric divisor used by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric divisor used by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

inputs.label: Package Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

inputs.label: Stackable
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage density and handling cost. Six Sigma material flow optimization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage density and handling cost. Six Sigma material flow optimization.

inputs.label: Hazardous Material
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

rules.message: All dimensions must be greater than zero.
Actual weight must be greater than zero.
No single dimension may exceed 500 cm (ISO 1:2016).
For cylinders, width and height must be equal (diameter).
Pallet dimensions must be at least 80x100x100 cm (EUR pallet standard).

thresholds.message: Package exceeds standard oversize threshold (68 kg DIM). Additional handling fees may apply.
DIM weight is more than 3x actual weight. Significant cost inefficiency detected. Consider repackaging.
Hazardous material surcharge will be applied. Ensure proper documentation (IATA/IMDG).
Non-stackable packages may incur additional storage and handling costs.
